content_en: Dada Poetry (dadapoetry.cat) is an independent digital platform for experimentation and publishing, created in response to the cultural fatigue produced by flat, homogenized editorial content.

The project is rooted in Glossolalia, a space dedicated to experimenting with literature in plain text (.txt), shaped by the technical limitations of the 1990s. What was once a technical constraint at the end of the twentieth century has now become an aesthetic imperative.

The platform's primary aim is to make room for works that would never survive the audience retention metrics of a book published in 2026 or a mainstream cultural website. For this reason, the website's code supports only plain text, images, and .mp3 files.
Dada Poetry works as an avant-garde community: a meeting place for creators who want to rediscover reading and creation through healthier, more diverse ways of engaging with both.
Project currently ongoing. Submissions for the second issue now open.
projects.title: Dada Poetry
content: Dada Poetry (dadapoetry.cat) és una plataforma d'experimentació i publicació digital independent nascuda de la fatiga cultural que generen els continguts editorials plans i homogenis.

El projecte es basa en el portal Glossolalia, un espai on s'experimentava amb la literatura en format de text pla (.txt) a causa de les limitacions tècniques dels anys 90. Però, allò que a finals de segle era una obligació tècnica, ara ha passat a ser un deure estètic.

L’impuls principal de la plataforma és permetre la lectura de peces que no superarien la taxa de retenció d’audiències d’un llibre editat al 2026 o d’un portal cultural genèric. És per aquesta raó que el codi del web només suporta text pla, imatge i .mp3.
Dada Poetry funciona com una comunitat d'avantguarda: un espai de trobada per a creadors que volen tornar a llegir i a crear de formes més sanes i heterogènies.
El projecte es troba actualment en curs. La recepció de peces per a la segona entrega és oberta.

seo.title: Dada Poetry (ISSN: 3137-6738)

seo.description_en: Dada Poetry is an independent digital platform for experimentation and publishing, created in response to the cultural fatigue produced by flat, homogenized editorial content.

content_en: Avant-garde zero (ag0.surge.sh) is a digital magazine established as the zero point of a new international avant-garde.
The publication is dedicated to theorizing and putting into practice the foundational principles.
Launched in English to connect with creators who share the conviction that a new avant-garde is vital to overcome the current crisis of art.
Project is currently active and open for international contributions.
